title: Simple Decorations
description: A small mod adding some Villager profession themed decorations.
body:
This mod currently adds 9 decorations themed around 4 of villager professions:

-Cartographer

![car](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/InAkadMA/images/29348bd1e9f3d5b299d5732499df835e192a63e9.png)

-Weaponsmith

![wea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/InAkadMA/images/e2d5a31fac46c4d9d118503ea4a71fa6ac118986.png)

-Mason 

![mas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/InAkadMA/images/d58edd4df3f4a967207d139b06dbc63e976895a5.png)

-Butcher


**_Additional decorations with new themes will come!_**


Available at [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-decorations)
